CustomField.description: The parent Contract Item Price in the bundle hierarchy, mirroring the source Quote's bundle structure (a fare's parent Term). Set during generation by resolving the source line's ParentQuoteLineItemId (with a QuoteLineRelationship root fallback) to the CIP created from that parent line. Self-lookup; a CIP has at most one parent, and a top-level (bundle root) CIP has none.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The parent contracted price this one rolls up under, mirroring the source quote's bundle (e.g. a fare under its Term).
CustomField.label: Parent Contract Item Price
